data.title: 2-Day Penang  Weekend

stops.description: Charcoal-toasted bread with kaya and half-boiled eggs since 1959
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your breakfast — a highly rated spot
stops.address: Lebuh Campbell, George Town, 10450 George Town, Pulau Pinang, Malaysia

stops.description: Coastal hike to secluded Monkey Beach and lighthouse
stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your nature — a hidden gem locals love
stops.address: Pejabat Taman Negara P. Pinang jalan Hassan Abbas, 11050 George Town, Penang, Malaysia

stops.description: Three heritage shophouses joined, 30+ cakes daily

stops.aiReasoning: Selected for your night activity — a hidden gem locals love

tips: Try local drinks — teh tarik, cendol, nutmeg juice, calamansi lime
Wear comfortable walking shoes for heritage area exploring
Book popular attractions online to skip long weekend queues
Check opening hours — some famous spots close on Mondays
